name: IRC_WABA_TEMPLATE_DETAILS
description: This table stores details of whatsapp templates, including their status, decision date, rejection reason, and template IDs.

columns.Name: WA_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier for a WhatsApp template in Recruiting. Foreign key, references WA_TEMPLATE_ID column in irc_whatsapp_template_b

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_LANGUAGE
columns.Comments: Indicates the oracle code of the language into which the contents of the translatable columns are translated.

columns.Name: WABA_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Unique ID generated by Meta upon creating the WhatsApp template

columns.Name: WABA_TEMPLATE_STATUS
columns.Comments: The current status of the WhatsApp template as in Meta. Possible values include ORA_DRAFT, ORA_APPROVED, ORA_REJECTED, ORA_PENDING_APPROVAL, ORA_SUSPENDED, ORA_INACTIVE

columns.Name: REJECTION_REASON
columns.Comments: Explanation for why Meta rejected the WhatsApp template

columns.Name: DECISION_DATE
columns.Comments: Timestamp of Meta's latest decision regarding the WhatsApp template

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
